mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_coupon (user_id, coupon_id, status, receive_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponId}, #{status}, #{receiveTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coupon_id = #{couponId}
